summary: Completed testing of Fleet OS Iteration 4 features: Trip Assignment with Contract Selection, Invoice Update API, Invoice Details with Duty Slips, Default Rates API, Corporate Booking (no estimated fare), and Billing Page revamp. Fixed a critical bug where SelectItem with empty string value was causing runtime errors in the Generate Invoice and Assign Trip modals.

fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' runtime error
fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and added value transformation in onValueChange handler

fixed.issue: Same SelectItem empty string value error for contract selection
fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and added value transformation in onValueChange handler

passed_tests: Admin Authentication - Login with admin@fleetOS.com
Default Rates API - GET /api/settings/default-rates
Default Rates API - PUT /api/settings/default-rates
Trip Assignment - GET /api/clients (list clients)
Trip Assignment - GET /api/contracts (list contracts)
Invoice Update API - GET /api/invoices (list invoices)
Invoice Update API - PUT /api/invoices/{id} (update line items)
Invoice Update API - PUT /api/invoices/{id} (update extra charges)
Invoice Update API - PUT /api/invoices/{id} (update GST percentage)
Invoice Update API - PUT /api/invoices/{id} (update status)
Invoice Details - GET /api/invoices/{id} (returns duty_slips_detail, client_detail, contract_detail)
Billing Page - GET /api/duty-slips (signed slips for billing)
Billing Page - POST /api/invoices (create from duty slip IDs)
Corporate Booking - No estimated fare in booking response
Invoice Duty Slip Count - Invoices have duty_slip_ids for counting
UI - Billing page loads with Generate Invoice button
UI - Billing page shows unbilled duty slips summary
UI - Billing page shows Duty Slips column in invoice table
UI - Generate Invoice modal with client, contract, billing period, GST, due days
UI - Edit Invoice modal with line items, extra charges, GST editing
UI - View Invoice modal with duty slips detail
UI - Trip Management page with contract selection in assign modal
UI - Corporate Bookings page without estimated fare section
critical_code_review_comments: Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - low priority

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no available vehicles/drivers)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 4 features are fully functional. Key features tested: 1) Trip Assignment with Contract Selection - POST /api/duties/{id}/assign now accepts optional contract_id, 2) Invoice Update API - PUT /api/invoices/{id} allows editing line items, extra charges, and GST, 3) Invoice Details - GET /api/invoices/{id} returns duty_slips_detail, client_detail, contract_detail, 4) Default Rates API - GET/PUT /api/settings/default-rates for fallback pricing, 5) Corporate Booking - No estimated fare shown (removed), 6) Billing Page - Revamped with duty slip selection, invoice generation, and editing. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in both Billing.js and TripManagement.js.

trip_assignment_with_contract.ui: Contract select dropdown in Assign Trip modal

corporate_booking_no_estimated_fare.removed_feature: Pricing estimate in corporate booking form

features: Duty slip count column in invoice table
Generate Invoice from duty slip selection
Edit Invoice modal with line items and extra charges
View Invoice modal with duty slips detail
